description: Cross-ERD integration ground truth for ERD-A and ERD-B. Correspondences are induced by shared canonical concepts in the two per-ERD ground truth models; this file records the induced matches, the coverage gaps, and the genuine conflicts the expert must resolve to produce one integrated ontology. Reference for scoring the cross-ERD task; not a method.

concept_matches.basis: same relator (Passenger × Flight); A entity Seat / canonical SeatAssignment, integrated name = Booking

unique_to_a.note: A models crew, baggage belts, location-as-entity, and a reified flight-status history that B does not represent.

unique_to_b.note: B normalizes aircraft model into a type entity and adds several descriptive attributes A lacks.

conflicts.resolution: integrated relator named Booking; SeatAssignment is the ERD-A view

conflicts.detail: A: natural key (flightNumber, flightDate); B: surrogate flight_id
conflicts.resolution: canonical natural key (flightNumber + departureTime); surrogate kept as a secondary id

conflicts.detail: A: natural key passportNumber; B: surrogate pax_id
A: composite key (passenger, flight); B: surrogate booking_ref
conflicts.resolution: relator identified by its participants; surrogate kept as secondary id
canonical firstName + lastName; B.full_name is unpacked into them
keep departureTime/arrivalTime; flightDate is the date part of departureTime
promote to first-class AirplaneType; A's airplane_model becomes a modelName value of it

conflicts.detail: A: reified FlightStatusType + FlightStatusEvent (history); B: status attribute (current state)
conflicts.resolution: keep the reified FlightStatusEvent; B.status is the most recent event's status

conflicts.detail: A: Location entity (location_code, city); B: city/country folded into Airport
conflicts.resolution: keep Location as a first-class concept; B's city/country populate it

conflicts.detail: A: Seat as a reified table; B: seat as a Booking attribute
conflicts.resolution: the relator Booking carries seatNumber as a descriptive attribute
